description: Brief description of what this schema extracts

pageName.description: What type of page this matches
pageName.container: CSS selector for repeating item containers (optional — omit for single-item pages)

fieldName.attribute: HTML attribute name (only when type is 'attribute' and selector is a CSS selector, not @attr shorthand)

_fieldTypeReference.text: innerText of the first matching element, trimmed
_fieldTypeReference.textAll: Array of innerText from all matching elements
_fieldTypeReference.attribute: Value of an HTML attribute. Use '@attrName' as selector shorthand on the container, or a CSS selector + 'attribute' key for nested elements
_fieldTypeReference.exists: Boolean — true if selector matches at least one element

_selectorNotes.@data-asin: Shorthand: '@' prefix reads an attribute directly from the container element itself
_selectorNotes.h2 a span: Standard CSS selector scoped to each container (or document if no container)
_selectorNotes.#productTitle: ID selectors work best for single-item product pages
